ops.title: cc-skills yaml precommit fragments + self-pin bump
ops.description: Commit A: plugin/guides/yaml/precommit-{base,go,python,swift}.yaml (base owns repos: key + repo:builtin hygiene block w/ --maxkb=1024 and --markdown-linebreak-ext=md; language fragments are list continuations w/ centrally-managed revs) + version-control.md sentence on ship-runs-hooks (append to CURRENT fragment — it changed at 7427f102). Commit B: full render self-pin bump + cc-skills own config layout. Ordering: requires cc-guides KindYAML release first.

ops.text: cc-guides lint plugin/guides/ passes and guides-lint.yml green on main
commit B lock pins a sha containing the yaml fragments and cc-guides check is green
